data.title: Trump Accuses Iran of Violating Ceasefire Agreement
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has accused Iran of significantly breaching the ceasefire agreement. According to Odaily, Trump remains optimistic about reaching a peace agreement with Iran.

data.title: Trump claimed that Iran had seriously violated the ceasefire agreement, but still believed that a peace agreement could be reached with Iran.
data.description: According to ABC News: Trump stated that Iran has seriously violated the ceasefire agreement; however, he still believes a peace agreement with Iran is possible. (Jinshi)

data.title: The President of Kyrgyzstan met with Justin Sun; the TRON ecosystem will be fully implemented in Kyrgyzstan.
data.description: On April 18, Kyrgyz President Sadyr Japarov held fruitful talks with Justin Sun, founder of TRON, in the capital Bishkek. The two sides reached broad consensus on the application of TRON infrastructure in Kyrgyzstan, the ecosystem expansion of the national stablecoin KGST, and in-depth cooperation in the fields of AI and blockchain. President Japarov stated that Kyrgyzstan aims to become a regional hub for virtual assets and Web3 technologies in Central Asia. Justin Sun stated that Kyrgyzstan will provide comprehensive strategic support, encompassing specific proposals including joint development of a sovereign large language model, the construction of a cryptocurrency exchange, digital banking services, and the construction of a hydroelectric-driven data center.

data.title: Kyrgyzstan Aims to Become Central Asia's Virtual Asset Hub
data.description:
Kyrgyzstan President Sadyr Japarov held a productive meeting with TRON founder Justin Sun in Bishkek. According to Foresight News, the discussions centered on the implementation of TRON infrastructure in Kyrgyzstan, the expansion of the national stablecoin KGST ecosystem, and deepening cooperation in AI and blockchain sectors.

President Japarov expressed Kyrgyzstan's ambition to become a regional center for virtual assets and Web3 technology in Central Asia. Justin Sun pledged comprehensive strategic support, including proposals for joint development of sovereign large language models, establishment of cryptocurrency exchanges, digital banking services, and hydropower-driven data centers.

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. Turkish Foreign Minister: Both the US and Iran are willing to continue dialogue, but some differences remain; 2. Polymarket's "greenrooibos" account transferred 978,000 ZRO to Binance, incurring a loss of $470,000; 3. BitGo's custodial wallet transferred 8.253 million TRUMP to OKX; 4. Iranian Parliament Speaker: Prepared for both diplomatic and military confrontation; 5. Pakistani sources: US-Iran negotiations may be held before Friday; 6. Justin Sun deposited $125 million of ETH withdrawn from Aave into Spark; 7. 0xSun: News-driven trading still has advantages; currently favoring long BTC to hedge against shorting altcoins; 8. Chinese Meme coins collectively corrected, with Binance Life falling over 26% and "I'm Here" falling over 40%.

data.title: Iranian Forces Block Two Oil Tankers in Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Iranian armed forces have reportedly prevented two oil tankers from passing through the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday. According to Odaily, the incident was reported by Iran's Tasnim News Agency. The Strait of Hormuz is a strategic chokepoint for global oil shipments, and any disruption in this area can have significant implications for international oil markets.

data.title: Iran's Tasnim News Agency: Iranian armed forces prevented two oil tankers from passing through the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday.
data.description: According to Iran's Tasnim News Agency, Iranian armed forces prevented two oil tankers from passing through the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday. (Jinshi)

data.title: Russia Proposes Severe Penalties for Illegal Crypto Exchanges
data.description: Russia has introduced a draft bill that aims to impose harsh penalties on operators of illegal cryptocurrency exchanges. According to NS3.AI, the proposed legislation could result in up to seven years of forced labor for those found guilty of running unregulated crypto trading platforms. The Russian government has highlighted the significant volume of daily trading in these unregulated markets, estimated at approximately $648 million. The bill is currently awaiting approval and, if passed, is set to become effective on July 1, 2027.

data.title: Lido Earn: Suspension of additional deposits to earnETH due to Kelp DAO vulnerability.
data.description: According to a statement from Lido, the Lido Earn team is aware of the exploitation of the Kelp DAO and that earnETH has exposure to rsETH. As a precaution, they have suspended additional deposits to earnETH and are assessing the situation with relevant partners. More details will be released later.

data.title: Alcoa plans to sell an idle smelter to NYDIG, while Bitcoin mining companies are accelerating their deployment of energy infrastructure.
data.description: Alcoa is reportedly close to a deal to sell its long-dormant Massena East aluminum smelter in New York State to Bitcoin mining company NYDIG. CEO Bill Oplinger stated that the transaction is expected to close by mid-year. The smelter, which closed in 2014 due to rising energy costs and increased global competition, possesses well-developed infrastructure including substations, transmission lines, and high-capacity grid access, making it highly attractive to Bitcoin mining farms and data center operators. Furthermore, the site has access to hydroelectric power from the New York State Electricity Authority, which will help reduce energy costs and enhance its low-carbon profile. This move comes at a time when the trend of transforming industrial land in the United States into digital infrastructure is gaining momentum. Previously, Century Aluminum sold its Hawesville, Kentucky smelter to TeraWulf for $200 million, planning to convert it into a high-performance computing and AI data center. Meanwhile, NYDIG continues to expand its Bitcoin mining footprint and already holds a stake in mining company Coinmint. With mining profits under pressure, several mining companies, including MARA, Hive, and Hut 8, are accelerating their transformation towards AI and cloud computing infrastructure. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Turkish Foreign Minister: Both the US and Iran are willing to continue dialogue, but some differences remain.
data.description: Turkish Foreign Minister: Both the US and Iran are willing to continue dialogue. Negotiations between Iran and the US are essentially complete, but some differences remain, necessitating an extension of the ceasefire. (Jinshi)

data.title: A Polymarket account named "greenrooibos" transferred 978,000 ZRO tokens to Binance, incurring a loss of $470,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, LayerZero, the cross-chain bridge exploited by hackers in the rsETH vulnerability incident, saw its token ZRO drop 18% today, from $1.9 to $1.5. A Polymarket account named greenrooibos transferred 978,000 ZRO (worth $1.57 million) to Binance 10 minutes ago, incurring a loss of $470,000. These ZRO were withdrawn from Binance two weeks ago, at which time they were worth $2.04 million.

data.title: Chancellor Rachel Reeves to Meet UK Bank Executives Amid Iran Crisis Impact
data.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves is set to meet with executives from the largest UK banks on Wednesday. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing Iran crisis and its impact on Britain's economy. The meeting aims to address economic concerns and discuss potential strategies to mitigate the crisis's effects on the financial sector.

data.title: Midas Resumes Standard Operations for mToken Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
Midas has announced the gradual resumption of standard minting and redemption operations for all mTokens. According to Foresight News, the company expects all issuance and redemption activities to return to normal by the end of the day, pending further communication with Aave and KelpDAO.

Earlier, Midas halted the LayerZero OFT cross-chain service at 5:15 today (22:15 Central European Time yesterday) due to the impact of the rsETH incident. This action was part of a standard response protocol to address market fluctuations and protect user interests. Midas stated that it will continue to monitor the situation and provide updates through official channels.

data.title: Bitcoin's Profit Divergence Signals Potential Market Shift
data.description:
On April 19, on-chain analyst Murphy noted a divergence between Bitcoin's price action and realized profits. According to BlockBeats, after Bitcoin reached $78,000, the 24-hour average realized profit was $39.15 million, which is less than when Bitcoin hit $76,000 on April 14. This divergence often indicates that the demand side may not sustain further concentrated profit-taking, suggesting a potential decline in upward momentum, similar to patterns observed on January 7 and January 14. The reduced trading volume over the weekend could also be a contributing factor.

If the divergence is primarily due to the demand side's inability to handle more concentrated profit-taking, it could signal that the rebound has peaked. However, if the weekend's decreased market activity is the main cause, further observation in the coming trading days is necessary.

data.title: 8.253 million Trumps transferred from BitGo escrow wallet to OKX
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, 8.253 million TRUMPs (US$23.44 million) were transferred from the BitGo custodial wallet to OKX 10 minutes ago. Tracing back, these TRUMPs originated from a transfer from the team wallet two months ago.

data.title: Lotus Technology Explores Integration of Crypto and Smart Mobility
data.description:
At the 'Crypto 2026: From Cryptocurrency to Smart Economy' forum in Hong Kong, Lotus Technology Inc. CFO Dr. Daxue Wang delivered a keynote speech on the integration of cryptocurrency with the real economy.

According to ChainCatcher, Dr. Wang emphasized that smart mobility is a pioneering vehicle for the smart economy. Lotus, a luxury electric vehicle brand with a 78-year history and listed on Nasdaq, is actively exploring the deep integration of crypto technology with the real economy. He outlined three main directions for this integration.

Firstly, the protection of data value through blockchain's immutable and privacy-preserving features, allowing users absolute control over their personal data and enabling trustworthy data circulation and value exchange. Secondly, the release of asset value by exploring efficient circulation and fair trading of assets such as vehicle sales, brand value, intelligent driving technology patents, and global sales networks through Real World Assets (RWA), while also promoting the credible traceability of green travel carbon assets. Thirdly, the co-creation of ecological value by recording driving, charging, and maintenance data through on-chain smart nodes, enabling users to transition from 'car owners' to 'participants in the brand ecosystem.'

Dr. Wang noted the current challenges, including compliance implementation, technology adaptation, and ecosystem co-construction, but highlighted the opportunities in open collaboration to make smart mobility a tangible scenario in the smart economy. Lotus aims to collaborate with the crypto ecosystem to achieve the vision of transitioning from purchasing a Lotus car to sharing in the growth value of Lotus Technology.

data.title: Spark's Head of Strategy: ETH Market Faces Liquidity Risk Due to Potential 10-15% Cut in rsETH Loans
data.description: Spark's Head of Strategy, monetsupply.eth, stated in an article on the X platform that the situation is entering a more dangerous phase as the stablecoin market begins to lack liquidity. He believes that approximately 16.5% of the ETH market is backed by rsETH. If rsETH-backed loans suffer losses across the mainnet and external chains, emode could face a 10% to 15% slashing, leaving 2% to 3% for ETH suppliers to smooth out the umbrella structure. ETH suppliers naturally tend to exit as quickly as possible to avoid this risk, thus locking utilization at 100%. Lending rates are insufficient to incentivize repayment of unrelated LST cycles (wstETH, weETH) to release liquidity. Because ETH cannot be withdrawn, users who borrowed stablecoins like USDT and used ETH as collateral cannot close their positions even when stablecoin lending rates rise, cutting off a typical incentive mechanism for maintaining market health. Two unhealthy incentives are currently causing market utilization to lock at 100%: 1) ETH holders are unable to close positions to maintain a healthy LTV, and liquidators are unable to atomically withdraw or sell collateral, potentially leading to bad debts due to a drop in ETHUSD price. 2) Users supplying USDT tend to maximize borrowing of other stablecoins to exit their holdings; this position is currently generating positive returns (temporarily), thus the exit cost is low; if conditions worsen, at least 75% of the position value can be recovered. The bottom line is that these pooled/re-staking lending markets must maintain liquidity at all costs to function properly. The recent reduction in Aave's maximum lending rate by Slope2 is having a negative impact and significantly increases the risk of cascading market failure.

data.title: Iranian Parliament Speaker: We are prepared for both diplomatic and military confrontation.
data.description: According to Iran's Tasnim News Agency on the 19th, Iranian Parliament Speaker Qassem Ghalibaf said that Tehran is actively engaged in diplomatic activities while also preparing for military confrontation. He emphasized that Iran distrusts its adversaries and is prepared for any war. (Xinhua)

data.title: Hyperwave Suspends LayerZero Bridging Amid Security Concerns
data.description: On April 19, Hyperwave, a DeFi project within the Hyperliquid ecosystem, announced its active monitoring of the Kelp rsETH incident. According to BlockBeats, the project is collaborating closely with security partners to safeguard Hyperwave assets from any potential impact. As a precautionary measure, Hyperwave has temporarily suspended all asset bridging via LayerZero.
